title: In Situ α-Synuclein Seed Amplification Assay (iSAA) on Free-Floating Mouse Brain Sections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3n5mj","text":"This protocol describes the detection of seed-competent aSyn species in free-floating tissue sections from animal models treated with aSyn preformed fibrils (PFFs), enabling visualization of aSyn species associated with seeded aggregates. Following the assay, the signal localized to regions containing CIAP-resistant aggregated PS129. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dhv4k","text":"Tissue collection for this protocol needs prior approval by the users' Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) or equivalent ethics committee.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Adjust pH to 6.0 with 1N NaOH and then add 0.5 ml of Tween 20 and mix well.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c015c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fut0o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cr0bm","text":"PBS (137 mM NaCl, 2.7 mM KCl, 10 mM Na2HPO4, 1.8 mM KH2PO4, pH 7.4)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5kf03","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"574up","text":"TBS (150 mM NaCl, 50 mM, Tris-HCl, pH 7.6)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"24d8h","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Blocking endogenous peroxidase
Wash sections in TBS (1/2) 00:05:00 TBS (pH 7.6) A B 1 NaCl 150 mM 2 Tris-HCl 50 mM
Block sections in 0.3% hydrogen peroxide in TBS at RT. 00:30:00
Heat-induced antigen retrieval
Heat citrate buffer to boiling in a microwave. Place the staining dish containing the sections into the hot citrate buffer. Citrate buffer, pH 6.0 A B 1 Citric Acid 10mM 2 Tween 20 0.05%
Maintain the temperature by placing the container in a water bath set to 98°C 00:10:00
Cool on ice until room temperature is reached.
Buffer preconditioning
Wash sections in PBS (1/2) 00:05:00 PBS (pH 7.4) A B 1 NaCl 137 mM 2 KCl 2.7 mM 3 Na2HPO4 10 mM 4 KH2PO4 1.8 mM

Add 100 mM PIPES buffer to each staining dish and incubate at RT 01:00:00 *Dilute the 200 mM PIPES stock buffer to 100 mM before use. PIPES buffer stock (200 mM, pH 6.9) Store at 4°C ***PIPES will not readily dissolve until the solution is raised above pH 6.5. Slowly pH solution, if desired pH is passed, then start over. DO NOT add acid to back pH.
Monomer incubation (overnight on thermomixer)
Set the thermomixer (Eppendorf ThermoMixer F2.0) to 37°C.
Transfer each sample to a 1.5 mL LoBind Eppendorf tube.
Add recombinant His-tagged mouse αSyn monomer (ACRO Biosystems; Cat# ALN-M52H6) diluted in PIPES buffer, to a final concentration of 0.025 mg/mL. For the negative control, add PIPES buffer only.
Incubate samples overnight at 37°C on the thermomixer with the heated lid closed to prevent condensation on the tube caps. 16:00:00
Fixation
Transfer samples from the 1.5 mL LoBind Eppendorf tube to a staining dish.
Wash sections in TBS (1/3) 00:03:00
Incubate sections in 4% PFA at RT 00:10:00 *Use freshly prepared 4% PFA. Alternatively, prepare small aliquots, freeze them, and thaw one aliquot before each use.
Washing and blocking
Wash tissues in PBS containing 0.5% Tween-20 (1/2) 00:05:00
Block sections in 10% normal horse serum and 0.5% Triton X-100 in TBS. 01:00:00
Primary antibody incubation
Dilute the HRP-conjugated anti-6×His antibody (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Cat# MA1-21315-HRP; 1:5,000) in the same blocking buffer and incubate at room temperature. 02:00:00
Detection
Wash tissues in PBS containing 0.5% Tween-20 (1/2) 00:05:00
Wash tissues in pH-adjusted imidazole buffer for nickel-enhanced DAB detection (bright-field imaging) or in borate buffer for tyramide fluorophore detection (confocal fluorescence imaging). 00:05:00
Detect His-tagged aSyn immunoreactivity
Wash sections in TBS (2/2) 00:05:00
Wash sections in PBS (2/2) 00:05:00
Wash sections in TBS (2/3) 00:03:00
Wash sections in TBS (3/3) 00:03:00
Wash tissues in PBS containing 0.5% Tween-20 (2/2) 00:05:00
Wash tissues in PBS containing 0.5% Tween-20 (2/2) 00:05:00
creator: Solji Choi
